stemHtml: An aircraft has a total mass of 7 220 kg with a CG of 4.16 m aft of the datum line. A few minutes before dispatch, an additional load of 170 kg is loaded onto the aircraft. With the aircraft's new CG at 4.31 m, where should the additional load be placed?

options.a: 6.50 m aft of the datum line.
options.b: 6.52 m in front of the datum line.
options.c: 10.68 m aft of the datum line.
options.d: 10.82 m aft of the datum line.
